duplicateSeverityScale.P0: Damages reviewer clarity. Move detail off parent pages or delete duplicate parent rendering.
duplicateSeverityScale.P1: Creates density or scanning failure. Compress to summary, link card, or child route.
duplicateSeverityScale.P2: Acceptable repetition but should be compressed.

blockedClaimsToPreserve: Cribl-routed or Wazuh-routed public proof is blocked unless separately repo-backed and promoted
website rendering as proof is blocked
green CI as merge or proof authority is blocked
source presence as runtime truth is blocked
validation truth as signal truth is blocked
private runtime evidence as public-safe material is blocked

duplicates.title: Public ceiling and blocked runtime/signal/public-safe status
duplicates.parentReplacement: Current ceiling: CONTROLLED_TEST_VALIDATED. Runtime and signal claims remain blocked.
duplicates.proofBoundary: Website rendering is not proof. The ceiling is claim guidance, not runtime or signal evidence.

duplicates.title: Validation registry and fixture summaries
duplicates.parentReplacement: Validation registry: controlled packages and fixture counts. Open validation detail.
duplicates.proofBoundary: Validation truth supports controlled-test results only. It does not prove runtime or signal truth.

duplicates.title: Proof Pack 001 release, manifest, and receipt
duplicates.parentReplacement: Proof Pack 001: released reviewer package at the current ceiling. Open pack details.
duplicates.proofBoundary: The release route does not promote runtime, signal, production, or public-safe runtime proof.

duplicates.title: Claim firewall and blocked public wording
duplicates.parentReplacement: Blocked claims remain visible. Open the control surface.
duplicates.proofBoundary: Blocked wording stays blocked until a separate evidence-backed promotion changes state.

duplicates.title: Platform contracts, SOAR, AutoSOC, LLM/GPU, and factory boundaries
duplicates.parentReplacement: Platform contracts: support-only structure and blocked authority footers. Open contract details.
duplicates.proofBoundary: Contracts define structure and gates. They do not prove live SOAR, runtime activity, model execution, or disposition authority.

duplicates.title: Evidence Bay and artifact inventory
duplicates.parentReplacement: Artifact inventory: filterable receipts and reviewer cards. Open Evidence Bay.
duplicates.proofBoundary: Artifact cards route to receipts; cards are not proof by themselves.

duplicates.title: AI is labor, governance is authority
duplicates.parentReplacement: AI supports labor. Human governance authorizes claims.
duplicates.proofBoundary: AI output cannot approve, promote, close, contain, suppress, or authorize a claim.

duplicates.title: Cyber Kill Chain and MITRE ATT&CK coverage map
duplicates.parentReplacement: Detection coverage map: lifecycle stage, ATT&CK mapping, validation, and proof boundary.
duplicates.proofBoundary: Mapping is reviewer navigation and coverage intent. It does not prove live telemetry, deployment, or customer use.

duplicates.title: Repository authority map and repo DAG
duplicates.parentReplacement: Repo authority map: where each truth surface lives.
duplicates.proofBoundary: Repo source truth does not prove runtime truth.

duplicates.title: Truth surfaces and proof plane separation
duplicates.parentReplacement: Truth surfaces: six surfaces, six proof meanings.
duplicates.proofBoundary: No surface inherits proof from another by presentation.

duplicates.title: HawkinsOps legacy boundary
duplicates.parentReplacement: Legacy context exists. Current claims require current evidence.
duplicates.proofBoundary: Legacy material does not automatically promote current HawkinsOperations claims.

duplicates.title: Website rendering is not proof
duplicates.proofBoundary: The website explains and routes. It does not author proof.
